title: Pseudo-file viewer with syntax highlighting and function navigation
purpose: Displays pseudo-file contents with syntax highlighting, file metadata, and interactive function blocks that can be navigated to.
module_context: Exports a forward-ref'd React component named PseudoViewer that handles loading, displaying, and navigating pseudo-files with methods.

methods.name: PseudoViewer
methods.normalized_params: ({ path, project, onFunctionsChange }: PseudoViewerProps, ref: React.Ref<PseudoViewerHandle>): React.ReactElement

steps.content: Initialize state for file data, loading status, and error handling.
Load pseudo-file content when path or project changes.
Notify parent component of function changes when file data updates.
Expose scroll-to-function functionality via imperative handle.
Render empty state when no file is selected.
Render loading spinner while fetching file content.
Render error message if file loading fails.
Render file header with metadata and breadcrumbs.
Render module header with title, purpose, and context.
Render function blocks if methods exist, otherwise show no functions message.
IF path or project is not set, clear file data and loading state.
Set loading state to true before fetching file.
Attempt to fetch pseudo-file content using project and path.
IF fetch succeeds, update file data state with the fetched content.
IF fetch fails, set error state with error message.
Reset loading state after fetch attempt completes.
Find the DOM element associated with the specified function name.
IF the element exists, smoothly scroll it into view at the top of the container.
Add a visual flash effect to the function element during scroll.
Remove the flash effect after 1.5 seconds.
